justBePatientDownloadAndPlatforms.title: Just Be Patient Download and Platforms
justBePatientDownloadAndPlatforms.intro: Just Be Patient is distributed through HexedHoney's official itch.io page. The page lists separate downloadable builds for desktop players and an Android APK, making itch.io the safest place to get the current release.
justBePatientDownloadAndPlatforms.subtitle: Play Just Be Patient from the official itch.io page. The game is available as a name-your-own-price download for Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android.

justBePatientBeginnerGuide.title: Just Be Patient Beginner Guide
justBePatientBeginnerGuide.intro: A normal playthrough takes about 40–60 minutes, but the game is designed for replay. New players should focus on character setup, reading choice text carefully, and saving before major branches so endings can be explored without restarting from the beginning every time.

steps.title: Start on the official itch.io page
steps.description: Use HexedHoney's official page and choose the correct build for your device before launching the game.
steps.tip: Avoid mirror download pages and use the listed Windows, macOS, Linux, or Android files.

steps.title: Customize your character
steps.description: The game supports a custom name, body type, and pronouns, so set up the protagonist before entering the story.
steps.tip: These settings help personalize the visual novel experience.

steps.title: Read every choice carefully
steps.description: Just Be Patient uses branching choices that affect the outcome, character reactions, and route direction.
steps.tip: Small dialogue choices can matter later, especially when Calvin reacts to your behavior.

steps.title: Save before major decisions
steps.description: Use saves before high-impact choices so you can replay branches and unlock different endings faster.
steps.tip: This is useful because the official page highlights multiple endings and replay-focused design.

steps.title: Replay with different attitudes
steps.description: Try different styles such as polite, confrontational, passive, resistant, scared, tired, or curious choices to reach new outcomes.
steps.tip: The game rewards replay because different paths can lead to different endings.

steps.title: Use aftercare when needed
steps.description: The game includes an aftercare page for players after intense scenes and mature psychological horror content.
steps.tip: Open it whenever you want a calmer reset before continuing or replaying.

quickTips: A normal Just Be Patient playthrough takes about 40–60 minutes.
Save before major choices so you can replay branches without starting over.
Different attitudes unlock different endings, so replay with new styles.
Use the aftercare page after intense scenes for a calmer reset.

justBePatientEndingsGuide.title: Just Be Patient Endings Guide
justBePatientEndingsGuide.intro: The official page confirms multiple endings, branching choices, and a story designed for replay. These route summaries organize the main ending paths by player attitude, key choice pattern, and final direction.
justBePatientEndingsGuide.subtitle: Just Be Patient includes multiple endings shaped by your choices. Use this guide to target specific routes while keeping the full story replayable.

endings.title: A Loving Heart
endings.answer: Choose a softer path: politely greet him, ask why he is staring, focus on mental health, ask why he chose you, lean into being tired, then tell him you love him.

endings.title: Compliance
endings.answer: Follow a similar calm route by politely greeting him, asking why he is staring, choosing mental health, asking why he chose you, choosing tired, then saying you do not love him.

endings.title: A Curious Mind
endings.answer: Take a curious route: confront him, ask why he brought you there, focus on the new medication, test the restraints, check the computer, then ask how long he has felt this way about you.

endings.title: Resistance
endings.answer: Push back against him: confront him, insult him, focus on the situation, test the restraints, ask if he plans to let you go, then choose an angry response.

endings.title: Mercy
endings.answer: Beg to be let go, focus on mental health, ask if he plans to let you go, refuse to eat, then choose a scared response.

endings.title: Passivity
endings.answer: Ignore him, ask why he brought you there, choose no concerns, continue with no concerns, ask if you can stay upstairs with him, then choose tired.

endings.title: Animal
endings.answer: Run, beg to be let go, choose either heart rate or physical pain, ask if he plans to let you go, then choose scared.

endings.title: Secret Ending
endings.answer: During the correct typed-input moment in Just Be Patient, enter the phrase makemebetter to unlock the secret route.

justBePatientChoicesWalkthrough.title: Just Be Patient Choices Walkthrough
justBePatientChoicesWalkthrough.intro: Just Be Patient is built around meaningful choices that shape the protagonist's experience and final outcome. The most useful way to replay is to treat each run as a clear attitude route: cooperate, question, resist, freeze, plead, or run.
justBePatientChoicesWalkthrough.subtitle: Track how early choices push the story toward affection, compliance, curiosity, resistance, fear, passivity, or survival. This walkthrough helps players replay routes without guessing every branch.

steps.title: Opening attitude choice
steps.description: Your early response sets the tone of the route. Polite choices support softer endings, confrontation supports curiosity or resistance, ignoring supports passivity, and running supports the Animal path.

steps.title: Main concern choice
steps.description: Mid-route concern choices help steer the ending. Mental health supports A Loving Heart, Compliance, or Mercy; the new medication supports A Curious Mind; the situation supports Resistance; no concerns supports Passivity.

steps.title: Action branch
steps.description: Physical or investigative actions can unlock route direction. Testing restraints and checking the computer support the curious path, while refusing food or asking to be let go supports fear and escape-focused paths.
choiceExamples: Ask if he plans to let you go

steps.title: Emotional final choice
steps.description: Late emotional choices usually decide the ending tone. Love points toward A Loving Heart, rejection points toward Compliance, anger points toward Resistance, fear points toward Mercy or Animal, and tiredness supports softer or passive conclusions.
choiceExamples: Tell him you do not love him

steps.title: Secret input moment
steps.description: One hidden route depends on a typed phrase rather than a normal menu choice. Enter makemebetter during the correct black-shirt typed-input moment to reach the secret ending.

steps.title: Replay efficiently
steps.description: Save before major choice clusters and replay by route style instead of changing random choices. This makes it easier to target endings and compare how Calvin reacts across branches.
choiceExamples: Replay one attitude route at a time

justBePatientSecretEndingGuide.title: Just Be Patient Secret Ending Guide
justBePatientSecretEndingGuide.intro: The secret-ending path is built around replaying early choices and noticing locked dialogue options. Players should save before major choices, test the beginning escape option, and watch for the typed-input moment with Calvin.
justBePatientSecretEndingGuide.subtitle: Find the hidden route clues behind the locked choices, secret input, and replay-only scenes in Just Be Patient.

spoilers.label: Locked ??? Choice
spoilers.detail: A hidden concern option marked as ??? can appear locked during the concerns section. Community route notes point players back to the early chase choice, where running changes later dialogue access.

spoilers.label: Run at the Beginning
spoilers.detail: Choose to run near the beginning. This leads to Calvin tackling the player, which later unlocks a concern option about the player's body being sore.

spoilers.label: Secret Typed Input
spoilers.detail: During the scene where Calvin is in the black shirt, type "makemebetter" when the game asks for player input.

spoilers.label: Replay Setup
spoilers.detail: Use manual saves before the early chase, the concerns section, and typed-input scenes. Just Be Patient is designed for replay, with branching choices that affect outcomes.

justBePatientCalvinCharacterGuide.title: Who Is Calvin in Just Be Patient?
justBePatientCalvinCharacterGuide.intro: Just Be Patient focuses on a toxic doctor-patient relationship where Calvin knows too much about the player and controls the unfamiliar environment. His reactions change based on dialogue choices, which makes replaying routes important for understanding the full character dynamic.
justBePatientCalvinCharacterGuide.subtitle: Calvin is the central figure behind the game's tense doctor-patient setup, psychological control, and branching horror routes.

cards.title: Central Antagonistic Figure
cards.description: Calvin drives the game's main conflict after the player is trapped in an unfamiliar environment. His presence shapes the tension, control, and fear behind each route.

cards.title: Doctor-Patient Power Dynamic
cards.description: The official story frames the horror around a toxic doctor-patient relationship. This makes Calvin's role less about simple jump scares and more about manipulation, power imbalance, and loss of autonomy.

cards.title: Choice-Reactive Behavior
cards.description: Player dialogue choices can change how Calvin behaves toward the main character. This supports the game's replay-focused structure and multiple-ending design.

cards.title: Psychological Horror Appeal
cards.description: Players often describe Calvin as unsettling, fascinating, and central to the game's yandere-style tension. His character is one of the main reasons users replay routes and search for endings.

justBePatientCgAndSceneUnlockGuide.title: Just Be Patient CG and Scene Unlock Guide
justBePatientCgAndSceneUnlockGuide.intro: Just Be Patient includes original character art, branching choices, and replay-focused routes. Players looking for missed CGs should test early choices, save before concern options, and revisit scenes where Calvin's reaction changes.
justBePatientCgAndSceneUnlockGuide.subtitle: Track route choices that lead to missed scenes, special art moments, and alternate Calvin interactions.

rows.unlockClue: Linked by players to the early run choice and the later sore-body concern option.
rows.routeTrigger: Run near the beginning, then use the unlocked concern dialogue later.
rows.replayNote: Save before the chase and before the concerns section.

rows.unlockClue: Triggered through a body-temperature style dialogue choice.
rows.routeTrigger: Choose the option that says the player is feeling hot.
rows.replayNote: Replay the same branch and test different comfort or concern responses.

rows.unlockClue: A ??? concern option can stay locked unless an earlier escape-related choice is selected.
rows.routeTrigger: Choose to run at the beginning so Calvin tackles the player.
rows.replayNote: Use this route to unlock dialogue about being sore.

rows.unlockClue: The official page confirms branching choices, multiple endings, and replay-focused design.
rows.routeTrigger: Save before major dialogue decisions and compare Calvin's reactions.
rows.replayNote: Complete obvious endings first, then return to earlier save points for missing scenes.

justBePatientContentWarnings.title: Just Be Patient Content Warnings and Aftercare Guide
justBePatientContentWarnings.intro: Just Be Patient is marked as 18+ and contains mature psychological horror themes. The official page highlights an aftercare page, making this section useful for players who want to understand the tone before starting.
justBePatientContentWarnings.subtitle: Review the game's mature themes, psychological horror warnings, and aftercare option before playing.

faqs.question: Is Just Be Patient suitable for minors?
faqs.answer: No. The official page marks Just Be Patient as 18+ and says it is not suitable for minors.

faqs.question: What kind of horror themes does Just Be Patient include?
faqs.answer: The official content warning lists psychological manipulation, kidnapping and confinement, fictional depictions of violence, coercion, power imbalance, loss of autonomy, guns, and other potentially distressing content.

faqs.question: Why does the Just Be Patient aftercare page matter?
faqs.answer: The aftercare page gives players a softer landing after intense scenes. It fits the game's psychological horror structure, where replaying routes can involve distressing or high-tension outcomes.

faqs.question: How should players approach intense routes in Just Be Patient?
faqs.answer: Players should read the warning first, use saves before major choices, and pause after heavy scenes if needed. The game is short, with an estimated 40–60 minutes per playthrough, so routes can be replayed at a controlled pace.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Just Be Patient

questions.question: What is Just Be Patient?
questions.answer: Just Be Patient is a short psychological horror visual novel by Hexed Honey, built around branching choices, multiple endings, and a tense doctor-patient dynamic with Calvin.

questions.question: Where can I download Just Be Patient?
questions.answer: Just Be Patient is available on the official HexedHoney itch.io page as a name-your-own-price download for Windows, macOS, Linux, and Android.

questions.question: How long is Just Be Patient?
questions.answer: A normal Just Be Patient playthrough takes about 40–60 minutes, but the game is designed for replay so players can explore different endings and routes.

questions.question: How many endings does Just Be Patient have?
questions.answer: Just Be Patient includes multiple endings shaped by your choices, including affection, compliance, curiosity, resistance, fear, passivity, survival, and a hidden secret ending.

questions.question: Is Just Be Patient suitable for minors?
questions.answer: No. Just Be Patient is marked 18+ and contains mature psychological horror themes. The official page also provides an aftercare page for intense scenes.

questions.question: Does Just Be Patient support Android?
questions.answer: Yes. Just Be Patient has an official Android APK build listed on the itch.io download section alongside the Windows, macOS, and Linux desktop builds.
